results.description: front matter metadata is extracted while YAML is omitted from rendered output
footnote references and definitions render into a linked footnotes section
definition lists render to dl/dt/dd structures
math profile renders inline and block math wrappers
superscript and subscript extensions render semantic sup/sub tags
smart punctuation transforms quotes, dashes, and ellipses in text nodes
citations render structurally while remaining outside the certified optional boundary
markdown-in-html requires trusted HTML and renders marked containers experimentally
